mobileStageSheet.title: Change stage

moveToasts.pendingApprovalSuccess: Lead moved to "{to}" — awaiting manager approval
moveToasts.forbidden: You don't have permission to move stages
moveToasts.conflict: This Lead has changed. Please refresh
moveToasts.invalidTransition: The Lead can't move to "{to}" directly — check the stage requirements
moveToasts.fallback: Failed to move stage — try again

moveStageConfirmModal.descriptionContractSigned: Link the deal to a contract or invoice before sending it for approval.
moveStageConfirmModal.descriptionClosedLost: Choose a loss reason to improve our analytics.
moveStageConfirmModal.lostReasonPrompt: Pick a quick reason (optional) — or write freely:
moveStageConfirmModal.lostReasonPlaceholder: Describe the loss reason in detail...
moveStageConfirmModal.confirmContractSigned: Move deal and send for approval
moveStageConfirmModal.loadFailedHint1: You may not have the required permission (finance.view / invoices.view).
moveStageConfirmModal.loadFailedHint2: Ask your manager to grant permissions, or use an admin account.
moveStageConfirmModal.noContractsHint: Create a new contract for the deal before moving it to the approval stage.
moveStageConfirmModal.noInvoicesHint: Create an invoice for the client before moving the deal to the approval stage.
